title: Hellion's Sniffer+ PT-BR Translation
description: Unofficial translation for Hellion's Sniffer+ in PT-BR (Brazillian Portuguese)
body:
Resourcepack to translate the mod Hellion's Sniffer+ to brazillian portugese. This translation is unofficial, but mod developers are welcome to use them in their mods officially. This is licensed on Creative Commons 4.0

**Installation:**

*   Download the zip file
*   Go to your .minecraft and find the resourcepack folder
*   Move the zip to the resourcepacks folder
*   Apply the resourcepack in game
*   Set your in game language to PT-BR

![Tutorial of language order in game](https://i.ibb.co/13gcZM8/image.webp)

This project was made using tools by Hispanic Translation Team
